scripts.build: npm --prefix desktop run build && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && pip3 install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-build.txt && pyinstaller --noconfirm --clean chalbolreflow-backend.spec
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm --prefix desktop run dist
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm --prefix desktop run dist:mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm --prefix desktop run dist:win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm --prefix desktop run dist:linux
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/dist backend/build desktop/dist desktop/dist-electron desktop/release
